diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,161 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types, src/types.ts (IntersectNonAnyTypes)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating handlers and middleware in Hono apps with flexible handler composition (x1 to x10).
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route
+- Safe summary: Helper for retrieving matched route paths and handlers from context.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSReadyState, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, defineWebSocketHelper, WebSocketHelperDefineHandler
+- Reads as: src/context, src/types, src/utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper for Hono with event handling and message streaming.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: src/context, src/utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie, src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie operations for setting, getting, and deleting signed/unsigned cookies with prefix support.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing
+- Safe summary: Testing helper that creates a test client with custom fetch to mock app requests.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: src/context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection helper for environment variables across different runtimes (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly).
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
+- Reads as: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/types, src/utils/html, src/css/common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css, src/helper/css/common
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for server-side rendering with dynamic class names and keyframes.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: selectPseudoGlobalSelector, isPseudoGlobalSelector, isPseudoGlobalSelectorRe, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, symbol exports (SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, CSS_ESCAPED), rawCssString, toHash, normalizeLabel, isValidClassName, isValidKeyframeName, defaultOnInvalidSlug, minify, buildStyleString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: This is a utility file with no external reads
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css, src/helper/css/common
+- Safe summary: Core utility functions for CSS template processing, class name generation, hash calculation, and CSS minimization.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, hopByHopHeaders, ALLOWED_TOKEN_PATTERN
+- Reads as: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper that forwards requests to another URL with proper header handling and RFC compliance.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev
+- Safe summary: Development helper to display and inspect app routes with method names and handler details.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: src/utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping helper for string interpolation with raw unescaped output.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: exports re-exports, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: src/helper/ssg/sg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/sg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Main SSG helper entry point that re-exports functions from sub-modules.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, DEFAULT_CONCURRENCY, DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE, DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR, createCssContext, isSSGContext, defaultExtensionMap, parseResponseContent, ToSSGResult, ToSSGOptions, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface
+- Reads as: src/client/utils/hono, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/css
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation that fetches routes, generates content, and saves to filesystem.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, normalizePath, handleParent, handleNonDot, handleSegments, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/handler, src/router
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for path manipulation and filtering SSG-eligible routes.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: exports stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming
+- Safe summary: Main streaming module entry point for SSE and text streaming helpers.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi, isOldBunVersion, contextStash
+- Reads as: src/context, src/utils/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming API helper for chunked response streaming with error handling and abort control.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage, streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, run
+- Reads as: src/context, src/utils/html, src/utils/s
